---
title: "OpticalPath"
sidebar: references
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_references.py; edit specs/dasdae-inventory.yml instead. -->

Continuous optical path described by independent component, geometry, coupling, and annotation tracks.

Aliases: `Path`

## Attributes

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | str | Human-readable optical path name. |
| `start_time` | datetime64 | Start time for which this metadata item is valid. |
| `end_time` | datetime64 | End time for which this metadata item is valid. |
| `optical_components` | tuple[[OpticalComponent](OpticalComponent.qmd), ...] | Ordered optical components on this path. |
| `geometries` | tuple[[Geometry](Geometry.qmd), ...] | Ordered geometries on this path. |
| `coupling_conditions` | tuple[[CouplingCondition](CouplingCondition.qmd), ...] | Ordered coupling conditions on this path. |
| `annotations` | tuple[[OpticalPathAnnotation](OpticalPathAnnotation.qmd), ...] | Ordered optical path annotations. |
| `otdr_traces` | tuple[[ExternalResource](ExternalResource.qmd), ...] | References to OTDR traces for this optical path. |
| `optical_length` | float | Computed total optical length from optical_components. |

## Contains

- [OpticalComponent](OpticalComponent.qmd)
- [Geometry](Geometry.qmd)
- [CouplingCondition](CouplingCondition.qmd)
- [OpticalPathAnnotation](OpticalPathAnnotation.qmd)

## Contained By

- [FiberArray](FiberArray.qmd)

## References

- uses [Cable](Cable.qmd)
- uses [Enclosure](Enclosure.qmd)

## Referenced By

_None._
